# VibeTether Intent Contract

Status: resolved
<!-- vibetether:intent:v1  -->

This contract is the durable statement of direction for a sanitized real-shape fixture.

## Goal

Safely migrate a real-shape VibeTether 0.6.3 project.

## Success evidence

- The 1.0 Contract is readable after migration.
- Rollback restores the original bytes.

## Scope boundaries

- Preserve user-authored project files.

## Non-negotiable constraints

- Preserve existing project instructions and higher-authority decisions.
- Confirm destructive actions and releases before execution.

## Visual direction

No additional visual direction.

## Open direction decisions

None.
